get.description:
Retrieves the status of a payment by its ID. Returns a polling delay to wait
before checking the status again.

parameters.description: Payment ID
parameters.name: id

parameters.description: Maximum time to long-poll for payment status, in milliseconds.
parameters.name: maxPollMs

post.description: Creates a new payment with the provided payment details.

parameters.name: WCP-Version
parameters.description: Optional WalletConnect Pay API version override. If omitted, the partner's pinned version is used.

parameters.name: startTs
parameters.description: RFC3339 timestamp, inclusive

parameters.name: endTs
parameters.description: RFC3339 timestamp, exclusive

parameters.name: token_symbol
parameters.description:
Filter by token symbol (e.g. `USDC`). CAIP-19 identifiers are not supported. Accepts a single value or multiple repeated params:

- Single: `?token_symbol=USDC`
- Multiple: `?token_symbol=USDC&token_symbol=EURC`

parameters.name: asset
parameters.description: Deprecated. This parameter will be removed in a future API version. Use `token_symbol` param instead.

parameters.name: network
parameters.description: Filter by [CAIP-2](https://standards.chainagnostic.org/CAIPs/caip-2) chain ID. Comma-separated for multiple.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Field to sort by

parameters.name: sortDir
parameters.description: Sort direction

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor — use the value from `nextCursor` in the previous response.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size (default 50, max 200)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description:
Filter by payment status. Accepts a single value or multiple repeated params:

- Single: `?status=succeeded`
- Multiple: `?status=succeeded&status=processing`

parameters.name: referenceId
parameters.description: Substring search on the merchant-provided reference ID. Between 3 and 35 characters. Allowed characters: ASCII letters, digits, and ` /-:.,+`.

parameters.name: merchantId
parameters.description:
Filter by merchant ID. Accepts a single value or multiple repeated params:

- Single: `?merchantId=acme-store-1`
- Multiple: `?merchantId=acme-store-1&merchantId=widget_co`

oneOf.description:
Machine-readable reason identifying why the payment failed. Present
only when `status == "failed"`.

Payment information (transaction hash, amount). Present when status is
Succeeded, null otherwise.

isFinal.description: True if the payment is in a final state and no longer requires polling

pollInMs.description:
Time to poll for payment status, in milliseconds. Not present if the
payment is in a final state.

PaymentFailureCode.description:
Machine-readable code identifying why a payment reached `Failed`.

Two distinct string forms exist per variant:
- **Strum** (`Display`/`AsRefStr`/`EnumString`): the DynamoDB storage form
  written to the `failure_reason` column. Preserves the existing on-disk
  value for rows written before this type existed.
- **Serde** (`Serialize`/`Deserialize`): the public API form. Deliberately
  decoupled from the internal term so that compliance-specific wording
  isn't surfaced to external consumers.

PaymentInformation.description: Payment information returned when payment succeeds

account.description: The account to use for the option

actions.description: Actions required to complete the option

oneOf.description: Per-option IC data collection info. Present when this option's account requires data collection, null otherwise.

etaS.description: Estimated time to complete the option, in seconds

expiresAt.description:
Unix timestamp (seconds) after which this quote is stale and confirm_payment
will reject it with `quote_expired`. The wallet should re-fetch options before
this deadline. `None` for direct-currency options that don't involve a rate.

id.description: ID of the option to be used to refer to it in other requests. May be up to 2^16 characters.

PaymentStatus.description:
Payment status representing the lifecycle of a payment.

Payments progress through these states from creation to terminal status.
Some states are specific to the payment source (pull vs push).

oneOf.description:
Machine-readable reason identifying why the payment failed. Present
only when `status == "failed"`.

Payment information (transaction hash, amount). Present when status is
Succeeded, null otherwise.

referenceId.description:
Merchant-provided reference ID for this payment, as supplied during
payment creation

oneOf.description:
Settlement metadata for the MTA → destination transfer. Null when
settlement has not completed yet (pending, non-MTA flows, or
pre-confirmation).

PaymentsSettlementAmount.description: Amount information for a successful settlement transfer.

unit.description:
Settlement unit — the asset or currency used in the settlement
transfer. Uses the same unit format as payment amounts
(e.g. "caip19/eip155:1/erc20:0xA0b86..." for crypto,
"iso4217/USD" for fiat).

PaymentsSettlementInformation.description:
Settlement metadata returned for MTA-based payments.

Only present once the settlement transfer has completed on-chain.

oneOf.description:
Settlement success details. Null while settlement is pending,
populated once the on-chain transfer completes successfully.

PaymentsSettlementSuccessful.description: Details of a successful settlement transfer.

amount.description: Settlement amount — the asset/currency and value transferred.

txId.description: Transaction hash of the MTA → settlement destination transfer.

String.description:
Represents a currency/token unit for payment amounts.

Can be either:
- A fiat currency (ISO 4217): `"iso4217/USD"`, `"iso4217/EUR"`
- A blockchain token (CAIP-19): `"caip19/eip155:1/erc20:0x..."`

issues.description: Field-level validation issues (present on validation errors)

value.description: Amount in minor units for the fiat currency
Amount in minor units for the token asset

MerchantPaymentSettlement.description: Settlement details. Omitted when settlement details cannot be reported yet. When present, `settled` is always included. When `settled` is `false`, no additional settlement fields are returned. When `settled` is `true`, `amount` and `txHash` are always included.

amount.description: Net settlement amount after fees in the settlement unit. Present only when `settled` is `true`.

txHash.description: Settlement transaction hash. Present only when `settled` is `true`.

referenceId.description: Idempotency / reference ID provided at payment creation

isTerminal.description: Whether the payment has reached a final state

accountCaip10.description: Buyer address as a [CAIP-10](https://standards.chainagnostic.org/CAIPs/caip-10) account ID

fees.description: Fee breakdown derived from payment option data. Omitted when total fee data is unavailable.

percentage.description: Percentage fee component as a decimal percentage string, not a ratio. For example, "0.4" means 0.4%.

settledAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp, present only when `settlement.settled` is `true`

nextCursor.description: Cursor for the next page, or null if no more results

amount.description: Revenue amount in currency's standard unit

ApiKey.description: Private API key for wallet authentication
ApiKey.name: Api-Key

AppId.description: Public App ID for wallet authentication. When using this auth mode, the Client-Id header is also required.
AppId.name: App-Id

apiKeyLegacy.name: X-Api-Key
apiKeyLegacy.description: **Deprecated.** Legacy service API key for path-based routes. `Api-Key` header is also accepted for backward compatibility.
